narrative:
Washington Township has 1,063 registered voters, with 49.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 43.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 36.9 percentage points.
